productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Printed Green Tshirts
description: Composition Green T-shirt made of 50% polyester and 50% cotton, has a ribbed crew neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on print/embroidery A bright green T-shirt with graphic lettering from mark taylor makes for a great casual wear. The words "Let the music play" with the image of the play button inspires you to groove to your own beat. Pair it with jeans and canvas shoes. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.11', Shoulders-17.5"
